subject: feat(icon): replace hexagon icon with multi-color 4-square grid
body:
The old hexagon-with-dots icon felt like a knowledge graph tool, not a
portfolio. New icon is a 2x2 grid of colored rounded squares (blue,
emerald, amber, violet) representing a collection of projects.

Multi-color palette is theme-independent — works with all 8 DaisyUI
theme combos without clashing. Each color reads as distinct even at
48px favicon size.

Tags: icon, branding, design
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: theme-combos
Semver: patch
